claims.claim: A member may make voluntary capital contributions to an LLC without consent of other members if the operating agreement does not explicitly prohibit such contributions
claims.caveat: Attorney Sam Wayne assessed this position as holding up well but 'not ironclad'; opposing argument could be made that agreement structure functionally requires joint agreement

claims.claim: Unauthorized access to a company's digital accounts (Google Ads, CRM) simultaneously triggers liability under CFAA, DTSA, and tortious interference claims
Trade secrets in digital account management are not the raw data (client names, spend figures) but the proprietary methodology (account configuration, bid structuring, campaign organization)
Establishing liability in trade secret and computer crime cases is typically easier than establishing damages; defense strategy predictably pivots to attacking causation and limiting damages period
Baseline damages in trade secret misappropriation = monthly revenue per affected client × expected client tenure (months)
CFAA and DTSA both permit 2× multiplier on actual damages for willful violations
Using product descriptions from third-party retailers (Crutchfield, Amazon, Best Buy) without authorization constitutes copyright infringement regardless of whether links are removed
Using manufacturer's own product copy to sell their products is generally tolerated and low-risk for authorized resellers
Tortious interference with business relationships requires: (1) known existing relationship, (2) intentional interference, (3) improper means, (4) causation, (5) damages
Ordinary competition and client solicitation by former employees is not actionable; the claim activates only when solicitation uses unauthorized access or stolen proprietary information
Criminal referral threat can function as settlement leverage by shifting defendant's calculus from financial risk to potential loss of liberty
A settlement can include language where plaintiff agrees not to proactively refer matter to DA, but cannot promise to stonewall independent law enforcement investigation
Fraud-based judgments are non-dischargeable in bankruptcy, making them more valuable than settlements that forgive debt
BluePoint ATM name is officially registered with USPTO as of December 2025 and may carry ® symbol
Breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing occurs when defendant solicits clients and damages revenue during active settlement negotiation period
claims.caveat: Claim is weaker standing alone and unlikely to survive if defendant waited until after deal closed

patterns.pattern: Asymmetric legal matters involve layered, overlapping federal and state claims (CFAA, DTSA, tortious interference, breach of good faith) that reinforce each other and foreclose different defense arguments
Unauthorized digital account access (Google Ads, CRM) is treated as both a federal crime (CFAA) and a civil violation (DTSA, tortious interference), creating compounding liability
LLC operating agreements that lack explicit prohibitions on unilateral capital contributions may permit strategic ownership changes without member consent
Product description copyright compliance requires sourcing from manufacturer websites rather than third-party retailers to avoid infringement liability
Settlement negotiations in computer crime cases should anticipate defense pivot from liability to damages causation and duration

contradictions.claim_a: The operating agreement does not contain an express prohibition on unilateral capital contributions
contradictions.claim_b: The operating agreement does not explicitly authorize unilateral capital contributions
contradictions.resolution: Not a true contradiction; both statements are true. The agreement is silent on the issue, which creates the legal ambiguity that the strategy exploits.

exceptions.general_rule: Ordinary competition and client solicitation by former employees is not actionable
exceptions.exception: When solicitation is conducted using unauthorized access or stolen proprietary information, tortious interference claim activates
exceptions.context: Egan matter; unauthorized Google Ads account access combined with client poaching

exceptions.general_rule: Criminal referral leverage is most credible when conduct clearly violates specific criminal statute
exceptions.exception: Leverage is diminished if defendant has nothing to lose (no assets or reputation to protect)

exceptions.general_rule: Breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing claim is available during settlement negotiations
exceptions.exception: Claim is unlikely to survive if defendant waited until after deal closed to interfere

exceptions.general_rule: Using manufacturer product copy is acceptable for authorized resellers
exceptions.exception: Using third-party retailer copy (Crutchfield, Best Buy) is copyright infringement even with links removed

evidence.metric: Three affected clients (Axley, Trachte, Adavacare) generated ~$9,000/month in aggregate revenue
evidence.context: Egan unauthorized account access and client poaching

evidence.metric: ~36-month average client tenure across affected clients
evidence.context: Baseline for damages calculation in Egan matter

evidence.metric: Baseline lost revenue calculation: ~$324,000 (3 clients × $9K/month × 36 months)
Mark Hope's estimated three-year value of three poached accounts exceeds settlement obligation owed to Egan
evidence.context: Egan settlement obligation nullified by account poaching

evidence.metric: TRO granted 2026-02-26 requiring Egan to restore full admin access to Get Found Madison Google Ads account by EOD
evidence.context: Emergency TRO hearing; Egan's attorney offered no defense

evidence.metric: Mark contributed $5,000 after Egan's termination to establish majority ownership
evidence.context: Capital contribution strategy; any amount exceeding Egan's capital account balance would suffice

evidence.metric: BluePoint ATM trademark registered with USPTO as of December 2025
evidence.context: Dual-logo mark (Reverse ATM) status pending legal confirmation

evidence.metric: Alpine product pages on Flynn Audio WooCommerce site contained copy sourced from Crutchfield
evidence.context: Copyright compliance audit; flagged as legal liability requiring remediation
